summary: Tested hidden boards feature and PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE name revert. All backend API tests passed (11/11). Frontend visibility panel works correctly - admin can toggle board visibility, hidden boards don't appear in selector, MASTER excluded from panel. 'PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE' correctly displayed throughout the app.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Hidden boards feature fully implemented. Backend: GET/PUT /api/config/hidden-boards in config.py lines 118-133. Frontend: useOrders.js has hiddenBoards state (line 25), fetchBoards loads hidden-boards (lines 70-79), toggleBoardVisibility function (lines 81-87). Dashboard.js: activeBoards filters out hiddenBoards (line 102), allBoardsIncludingHidden for panel (line 103), visibility panel at lines 405-424. Hidden boards stored in board_config collection with config_id='hidden_boards'.
